de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.macros

Class StartAuxiliaryMethodComputationMacro

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.macros.AbstractProofMacro
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.macros.StartAuxiliaryMethodComputationMacro
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    StartSideProofMacro, ProofMacro

    public class StartAuxiliaryMethodComputationMacro
extends AbstractProofMacro
implements StartSideProofMacro
    Author:
    christoph

    • Method Detail

      • getName

        public String getName()
        Description copied from interface: ProofMacro
        Gets the name of this macro. Used as menu entry
        Specified by:
        getName in interface ProofMacro
        Returns:
        a non-null constant string

      • getCategory

        public String getCategory()
        Description copied from interface: ProofMacro
        Gets the category of this macro. Used as name of the menu under which the macro is sorted. Return null if no submenu is to be created.
        Specified by:
        getCategory in interface ProofMacro
        Returns:
        a constant string, or null

      • getDescription

        public String getDescription()
        Description copied from interface: ProofMacro
        Gets the description of this macro. Used as tooltip.
        Specified by:
        getDescription in interface ProofMacro
        Returns:
        a non-null constant string

      • canApplyTo

        public boolean canApplyTo(Proof proof,
                 ImmutableList<Goal> goals,
                 PosInOccurrence posInOcc)
        Description copied from interface: ProofMacro
        Can this macro be applied on the given goals? This method should not make any changes but check if the macro can be applied or not on the given goals. This method may be called from within the GUI thread and be compatible with that fact.
        Specified by:
        canApplyTo in interface ProofMacro
        Parameters:
        proof - the current Proof (not null)
        goals - the goals (not null)
        posInOcc - the position in occurrence (may be null)
        Returns:
        true, if the macro is allowed to be applied

      • applyTo

        public ProofMacroFinishedInfo applyTo(UserInterfaceControl uic,
                             Proof proof,
                             ImmutableList<Goal> goals,
                             PosInOccurrence posInOcc,
                             ProverTaskListener listener)
                               throws Exception
        Description copied from interface: ProofMacro
        Apply this macro on the given goals. This method can change the proof by applying rules to it. This method is usually called from a dedicated thread and not the GUI thread. The thread it runs on may be interrupted. In this case, the macro may report the interruption by an InterruptedException. A ProverTaskListener can be provided to which the progress will be reported. If no reports are desired, null cna be used for this parameter. If more than one listener is needed, consider combining them using a single listener object using the composite pattern.
        Specified by:
        applyTo in interface ProofMacro
        Parameters:
        uic - the UserInterfaceControl to use
        proof - the current Proof (not null)
        goals - the goals (not null)
        posInOcc - the position in occurrence (may be null)
        listener - the listener to use for progress reports (may be null)
        Throws:
        InterruptedException - if the application of the macro has been interrupted.
        Exception
